title: Zhuangzi, Chapter 22: Knowledge Wandered North
description: Chapter 22 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.
introduction: Chapter 22 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.

translation.text: Knowledge wandered north to the banks of the Black Water, climbed the Knoll of Hidden Heights, and there by chance came upon Do-Nothing-Say-Nothing. 'There's something I want to ask you,' Knowledge said. 'What sort of pondering, what sort of cogitation does it take to know the Way?' Three times Knowledge asked, but Do-Nothing-Say-Nothing didn't answer.
